LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS THE ESTATE OF ROBERT E. BORRMANN AND DOROTHY BORRMANN, AS EXECUTRIX, PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE AND SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO THE ESTATE OF ROBERT E. BORRMANN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES REGARDING THE PLACARD AND WHETHER MR. BORRMANN ACTED NEGLIGENTLY AND WHETHER SUCH NEGLIGENCE WAS A SUBSTANTIAL FACTOR IN CAUSING THE ACCIDENT. HOWEVER, THE COURT IS INVITING MR. MORSE IN LIGHT OF THE AUTHORITY UNDER LE FRANCOIS TO FILE A MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION ON OR BEFORE OCTOBER 29 WITHIN THE TIME FRAME FOR SERVICE UNDER CCP 1005 AND THE MOTION TO BE HEARD ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 21, 2012. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND SEND BY WAY OF E-MAIL TO THE COURT WITH A COPY TO ALL COUNSELS). JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077
